HAVE HAD THIS CAR A YEAR.  WITHING 6 MONTHS SHIFTER WOULD NOT SHIFT BACK TO PARK AND COULDNT TURN CAR OFF.  DEALER FOUND ACORNS JAMMED IN TRANSMISSION SOMEWHERE FELT TO BE DUE TO SQUIRRELS OR OTHER RODENTS.  THIS MONTH EMISSONS LIGHT CAME ON.  FOUND FUEL LINE LEAKING DUE TO ANIMA

narrative.headline: What 2018 Acura Rdx owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 73 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel System (23% of reports).

issues.sample: HAVE HAD THIS CAR A YEAR.  WITHING 6 MONTHS SHIFTER WOULD NOT SHIFT BACK TO PARK AND COULDNT TURN CAR OFF.  DEALER FOUND ACORNS JAMMED IN TRANSMISSION SOMEWHERE FELT TO BE DUE TO SQUIRRELS OR OTHER RODENTS.  THIS MONTH EMISSONS LIGHT CAME ON.  FOUND FUEL LINE LEAKING DUE TO ANIMA
